news.headline: Pakistani, Indian nationals among 13 dead after 'technical malfunction' at Qatar LNG plant
news.summary:
<p>Pakistani and Indian nationals were among 13 killed after an explosion at Qatar’s massive Ras Laffan liquefied natural gas (LNG) complex, attributed to a “technical malfunction”, Qatar’s Minister of State for Energy Saad al-Kaabi said on Monday.</p>

news.headline: Pakistan Plans to Cut Tax on Menstrual Pads, but Many Say It’s Not Enough
news.summary: Activists said more action was needed to solve the larger problem: Only 12 percent of Pakistani women and girls use safe, commercially made menstrual products.
